items.ti: ፓስፖርት ምስ ናይ ስራሕ ፍቓድ — ኩሎም ገጻት
ናይ ልደት ምስክር ወረቐት ምስ ናይ እንግሊዝኛ ትርጉም

items.en: Divorce certificate / death certificate of previous spouse (with English translation)
items.ti: ናይ ፍትሕ ምስክር ወረቐት ወይ ናይ ሞት ምስክር ወረቐት ናይ ቀደም ሓዳስ — ምስ ትርጉም

items.en: Civil status documents (National ID with translation, Family registry)
items.ti: ናይ ሲቪል ደረጃ ሰነዳት — ናይ ሃገር መለለዪ ካርድ ምስ ትርጉም

items.en: Police certificates (from all countries lived 6+ months)
items.ti: ናይ ፖሊስ ምስክር ወረቓቕቲ — ካብ ዝነበርኩምዋ ሃገራት

items.en: Accompanying / non-accompanying children's info (height, eye colour, passport, birth certificate, 2 photos each)
items.ti: ናይ ቆልዑ ሓበሬታ — ቁመት፡ ናይ ዓይኒ ሕብሪ፡ ፓስፖርት፡ ናይ ልደት ምስክር ወረቐት
ናይ ስራሕ ደብዳቤ — ደሞዝ፡ ሰዓታት፡ ናይ ስራሕ ግዜ

items.en: Canadian passport or PR card (both sides)
items.ti: ናይ ካናዳ ፓስፖርት ወይ PR ካርድ — ክልቲኡ ሸነኽ

items.en: Divorce certificate if applicable (with English translation)
items.ti: ናይ ፍትሕ ምስክር ወረቐት እንተሃሊዩ — ምስ ትርጉም

items.en: Accompanying or Canadian children's birth certificates
items.ti: ናይ ቆልዑ ናይ ልደት ምስክር ወረቓቕቲ
ናይ ሕጂ ናይ ክራይ ቤት ስምምዕ — ስምታት ክልቲኦም

items.en: Previous lease agreement (if less than 1 year)
items.ti: ቀዳማይ ናይ ክራይ ቤት ስምምዕ — ትሕቲ 1 ዓመት እንተኾይኑ

items.en: Sponsor credit card / bank statements (12 months)
items.ti: ናይ ስፖንሰር ናይ ባንኪ/ክሬዲት ካርድ ቅጺ — 12 ኣዋርሕ

items.en: Applicant credit card / bank statements (12 months)
items.ti: ናይ ሕቶ ኣቕራቢ ናይ ባንኪ ቅጺ — 12 ኣዋርሕ

items.en: Applicant driver's license or service card
items.ti: ናይ ሕቶ ኣቕራቢ ናይ ምርዓው ፍቓድ ወይ ካርድ

items.en: Proof of funds transfers and shared finances
items.ti: ናይ ሓቢርካ ናይ ፋይናንስ ምዝውዋር ምስክር
ናይ ሶሻል ሚዲያ ጽሑፋት / ናይ ቻት ምልልሳት
20–30 ናይ ሓቢርኩም ስእልታት — ዝተፈላለዩ ግዜን ቦታን
ናይ ስፖንሰር ምብጻሕ ትኬት / ናይ ጉዕዞ ሰነዳት
ናይ ልደት ምስክር ወረቐት ምስ ትርጉም

items.en: Divorce / death certificate of previous spouse (with translation)
items.ti: ናይ ፍትሕ ወይ ናይ ሞት ምስክር ወረቐት — ምስ ትርጉም

items.en: Civil status documents (National ID, Family registry)
Canadian passport or PR card (both sides)
items.ti: ናይ ካናዳ ፓስፖርት ወይ PR ካርድ

sections.title: Proof of Common-Law Relationship (cohabitation 12+ months)
sections.tigrinya: ናይ ሓባራዊ ዝምድና ምስክር — 12+ ወርሒ ሓቢርኩም ዝቐመጥኩምሉ

items.ti: ናይ ሕጂ ናይ ክራይ ቤት ስምምዕ — ስምታት ክልቲኦም

items.en: Sponsor credit card statements x 12 months
items.ti: ናይ ስፖንሰር ናይ ክሬዲት ካርድ ቅጺ — 12 ኣዋርሕ

items.en: Applicant credit card statements x 12 months
items.ti: ናይ ሕቶ ኣቕራቢ ናይ ክሬዲት ካርድ ቅጺ — 12 ኣዋርሕ
ናይ ስፖንሰር ካልኣይ ክፍሊት ቅጺ — 12 ኣዋርሕ
ናይ ሕቶ ኣቕራቢ ካልኣይ ክፍሊት ቅጺ
ናይ ሕቶ ኣቕራቢ ናይ ምርዓው ፍቓድ
ናይ ጕዕዞ ታሪክ — ዝተጓዓዝኩምዎ ሃገራት ኩሎም
ፓስፖርት ምስ ናይ ስራሕ ፍቓድ — ኩሎም ገጻት
ናይ ዩኒቨርሲቲ ዲግሪ ምስ ናይ ECA ምስክር
ናይ ስራሕ ደብዳቤታት — 3+ ዓመታት ብቑዕ ስራሕ
ናይ ደሞዝ ደረሰኝ — ናይ ዝሓለፈ 3 ኣዋርሕ

items.en: Police certificates (all countries 6+ months since age 18)
items.ti: ናይ ፖሊስ ምስክር ወረቓቕቲ — ካብ ዝነበርኩምዋ ሃገራት
ናይ ባንኪ ደብዳቤ ምስ ናይ ፋይናንስ ምስክር

items.en: Children's information (height, eye colour, passport, permit, birth certificate, medical, photo)
Copy of passport with all stamps
items.ti: ቅዳሕ ፓስፖርት — ኩሎም ኣትሞ ዘለዎም ገጻት
LMIA — ናይ ናይ ሰራሕተኛ ኣድላይነት ምስክር

items.en: Offer of employment confirmation & payment receipt (if applicable)
items.ti: ናይ ስራሕ ሕቶ ምርግጋጽ ምስ ደረሰኝ (እንተሃሊዩ)
ናይ ሃገር ፍሉይ ቪዛ ቤት ሰነዳት

items.en: Proof of ties to home country
Copy of passport with all stamps
items.ti: ቅዳሕ ፓስፖርት — ኩሎም ኣትሞ ዘለዎም ገጻት

items.en: Study plan (why this school, why Canada)

items.ti: ናይ ሃገር ፍሉይ ቪዛ ቤት ሰነዳት

items.en: Proof of ties to home country

items.ti: ናይ ፋይናንስ ምስክር — ናይ ትምህርቲ ክፍሊት + ናብርን + ምምላስን

items.en: Copy of passport with all stamps
Proof of relationship to Canadian inviter
Proof of ties to home country
Copies of every page of current passport
items.ti: ቅዳሕ ናይ ሕጂ ፓስፖርት — ኩሎም ገጻት

items.en: Copies of every page of previous passport (if expired < 5 years ago)
items.ti: ቅዳሕ ናይ ቀደም ፓስፖርት (ትሕቲ 5 ዓመት ዝሓለፎ)

items.en: Copies of both sides of PR card
Copies of both sides of driver's license
items.ti: ቅዳሕ ናይ ምርዓው ፍቓድ — ክልቲኡ ሸነኽ

items.title: Espionage
items.detail: Engaging in espionage against Canada or contrary to Canada's interests

items.title: Subversion by force
items.detail: Engaging in or instigating subversion by force of any government

items.title: Subversion of democratic process
items.detail: Engaging in subversion against a democratic government, institution or process as understood in Canada

items.title: Terrorism
items.detail: Engaging in terrorism — activities directed toward violence for political objectives

items.title: Danger to security of Canada
items.detail: Being a danger to the security of Canada

items.title: Acts of violence endangering persons
items.detail: Engaging in acts of violence that would or might endanger lives or safety of persons in Canada

items.title: Member of security threat organization
items.detail: Being a member of organization that engages/has engaged/will engage in espionage, subversion or terrorism

items.title: War crimes / crimes against humanity
items.detail: Committing act outside Canada constituting offence under Crimes Against Humanity and War Crimes Act (ss.4–7) — genocide, crime against humanity, war crime

items.title: Senior official in rights-violating government
items.detail: Being a prescribed senior official in government that engages/has engaged in terrorism, systematic or gross human rights violations, genocide, war crime, or crime against humanity

items.title: Subject to international sanctions
items.detail: Entry/stay restricted by international organization decision imposing sanctions on a country (Canada is member)

items.title: Conviction in Canada — serious offence
items.detail: Convicted in Canada of offence punishable by max 10+ years OR sentence of more than 6 months imposed. Exception: record suspension (pardon) granted.

items.title: Conviction outside Canada — serious equivalent
items.detail: Convicted outside Canada of offence that, if committed in Canada, would be punishable by 10+ year max. Equivalency must be established.

items.title: Act committed outside Canada — serious equivalent
items.detail: Committed act outside Canada that is an offence there AND would be 10+ year offence in Canada. Standard: balance of probabilities for PRs.

items.title: Conviction in Canada — indictable or two offences
items.detail: Convicted in Canada of indictable offence OR two or more summary offences not from same occurrence. Hybrid offences deemed indictable.

items.title: Conviction outside Canada — indictable equivalent
items.detail: Convicted outside Canada of offence equivalent to Canadian indictable offence, or two offences not from single occurrence

items.title: Act outside Canada — indictable equivalent
items.detail: Committed act outside Canada that is an offence there AND would constitute indictable offence in Canada

items.title: Offence on entering Canada
items.detail: Committed on entering Canada an offence under prescribed Acts (Criminal Code, IRPA, Firearms Act, Customs Act, Controlled Drugs Act)

items.title: Member of criminal organization
items.detail: Being a member of or engaging in activity that is part of pattern of organized criminal activity (not limited to formal 'membership' — Thanaratnam 2005)

items.title: Transnational crime
items.detail: Engaging in transnational crime — people smuggling, trafficking in persons, money laundering (list not exhaustive)

items.title: Danger to public health
items.detail: Health condition likely to be a danger to public health. No exceptions for A38(1)(a).

items.title: Danger to public safety
items.detail: Health condition likely to be a danger to public safety. No exceptions for A38(1)(b).

items.title: Excessive demand on health/social services
items.detail: Condition reasonably expected to cause excessive demand. Exception: spouse/common-law/child of sponsor (Family Class), protected persons.

items.title: Unable or unwilling to support self
items.detail: Unable or unwilling to support self and dependents AND has not shown adequate arrangements (other than social assistance) for care and support. Applies to potential/current indigence.

items.title: Misrepresentation of material facts
items.detail: Directly or indirectly misrepresenting or withholding material facts that induces/could induce error in administration of the Act. 5-year bar applies. Subjective knowledge NOT required (Mohammed 1997).

items.title: Sponsored by person inadmissible for misrepresentation
items.detail: Being or having been sponsored by person found inadmissible for misrepresentation. Minister must be satisfied facts justify.

items.title: Refugee protection vacated
items.detail: Final determination to vacate decision allowing refugee protection claim

items.title: Citizenship obtained by misrepresentation
items.detail: Ceasing to be a citizen under Citizenship Act s.10(1)(a) — obtained citizenship through false representation or fraud

items.title: Non-compliance — foreign national
items.detail: Act or omission directly or indirectly contravening IRPA — includes overstay, unauthorized work/study, failure to appear for examination, failure to hold required visa

items.title: Non-compliance — permanent resident (residency obligation)
items.detail: Failing to comply with residency obligation: must be physically present in Canada 730 days in every 5-year period. H&C considerations may overcome breach.

items.title: Accompanying family member inadmissible
items.detail: Accompanying family member OR (in prescribed circumstances) non-accompanying family member is inadmissible. Exception: protected persons.

items.title: Accompanying inadmissible person
items.detail: Being an accompanying family member of an inadmissible person. Exception: protected persons.

all.title: Use of Representative
all.note: Required for almost all IRCC matters. Authorize RCIC to represent client. Each person 18+ signs own copy.

all.title: Service / Retainer Agreement
all.note: Required by CICC Code of Professional Conduct before work begins. Includes scope, fees, refund policy, termination.

all.title: Fee Agreement / Schedule of Fees
all.note: Can be part of retainer. Confirms total fees, payment structure, disbursements, trust account use.

all.title: Consent & Privacy Authorization (PIPEDA/FOIP)
all.note: Allows collection/storage of personal data and communication with IRCC, schools, employers.

all.title: Client Information & Declaration Form
all.note: Client confirms information is true and complete. Acknowledges consequences of misrepresentation.

all.title: Translation & Interpreter Acknowledgment
all.note: Important if using Tigrinya/Amharic translations. Confirms English version controls.

all.title: Third-Party Authorization
all.note: Used if family member, interpreter, or employer communicates on client's behalf.

irb_only.title: IRB Notice of Representation
irb_only.note: Required for RPD/RAD/IAD/ID proceedings. Separate from IMM 5476. Must be filed promptly after retained.

limited_scope.title: Limited Scope Representation Agreement
limited_scope.note: Used for partial services: document review, strategy consultation, application check, GCMS interpretation only.

opportunity_rules.action: Notify client to apply for CCB

opportunity_rules.trigger: Work permit holder — 1+ year Canadian skilled experience
opportunity_rules.opportunity: Express Entry / CEC pathway to PR
opportunity_rules.action: Assess CRS score and advise on Express Entry profile
Send renewal reminder and initiate extension file
Calculate physical presence days and advise on citizenship application

opportunity_rules.trigger: Spousal sponsorship approved — spouse now PR
opportunity_rules.action: Start tracking spouse's physical presence for future citizenship

opportunity_rules.trigger: Study permit holder — final year of study
opportunity_rules.action: Advise on PGWP eligibility and application timing
